verses.geez: ወደገመ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ አውሰበ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ እንተ ፡ ስማ ፡ ኬጡራ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam again took a wife, whose name was Chettura.
translations.kjv: Then again Abraham took a wife, and her name was Keturah.

verses.geez: ወወለደት ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዘስሙ ፡ ዘንቤሬ ፡ ወዮቅጦንሃ ፡ ወሜዶንሃ ፡ [ወምድያምሃ ፡] ወዮብቅሃ ፡ ወሴሄሃ ።

translations.lxx: And she bore to him Zombran, and Jezan, and Madal, and Madiam, and Jesboc, and Soie.
translations.kjv: And she bare him Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah.

verses.geez:
ወዮቅጦንሂ ፡ ወለዶ ፡ ለሴበቅ ፡ ወለቴማን ፡ ወለዴዳን ፡ [ወዴዳን ፡] ወለዶ ፡ ለራጕኤል ፡ ወለንባብዞ ፡ ወ[ለ]እዝራአም
                  ፡ ወ[ለ]ሎአም ።

translations.lxx: And Jezan begot Saba and Dedan. And the sons of Dedan were the Assurians and the Latusians, and Laomim.
translations.kjv: And Jokshan begat Sheba, and Dedan. And the sons of Dedan were Asshurim, and Letushim, and Leummim.

verses.geez: ወደቂቀ ፡ ምድያም ፡ ጌፌር ፡ ወአፉር ፡ ወሄኖኅ ፡ ወአቤሮን ፡ ወቲያራሶ ፡ እሉ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኬጡራ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Madiam were Gephar and Aphir, and Enoch, and Abeida, and Eldaga; all these were sons of Chettura.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Midian; Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abidah, and Eldaah. All these were the children of Keturah.

verses.geez: ወወሀቦ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ንዋዮ ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ ወልዱ ።

translations.lxx: But Abraam gave all his possessions to Isaac his son.
translations.kjv: And Abraham gave all that he had unto Isaac.

verses.geez:
[ወለደቂቀ ፡ ዕቁባቲሁ ፡ ወሀቦሙ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ሀብተ ፡ ወፈነዎሙ ፡ እምገጸ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ወልዱ ፡] እንዘ ፡ ሕያው ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ሠርቀ ፡ ፀሓይ ።

translations.lxx: But to the sons of his concubines Abraam gave gifts, and he sent them away from his son Isaac, while he was yet living, to the east into the country of the east.
translations.kjv: But unto the sons of the concubines, which Abraham had, Abraham gave gifts, and sent them away from Isaac his son, while he yet lived, eastward, unto the east country.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕይወቱ ፡ ሊአብርሃም ፡ ወዓመቲሁኒ ፡ ምእት ፡ ወ[ሰብዓ ፡] ወኀምስቱ ፡ ዓመት ።

translations.lxx: And these were the years of the days of the life of Abraam as many as he lived, a hundred and seventy-five years.
translations.kjv: And these are the days of the years of Abraham’s life which he lived, an hundred threescore and fifteen years.

verses.geez: ወረሢኦ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ሞተ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ሠናየ ፡ ርሥአ ፡ ወፈጸመ ፡ መዋዕሊሁ ፡ ወወደይዎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕዝቡ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam failing died in a good old age, an old man and full of days, and was added to his people.
translations.kjv: Then Abraham gave up the ghost, and died in a good old age, an old man, and full of years; and was gathered to his people.

verses.geez:
ወቀበርዎ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ወይስማኤል ፡ ውሉዱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ በአተ ፡ ካዕበት ፡ ዘገራህተ ፡ ኤፌሮን ፡ ዘሳአር ፡ ኬጥያዊ ፡
                  ዘአንጻረ ፡ ምንባሬ ፤

translations.lxx: And Isaac and Ismael his sons buried him in the double cave, in the field of Ephron the son of Saar the Chettite, which is over against Mambre:
translations.kjv: And his sons Isaac and Ishmael buried him in the cave of Machpelah, in the field of Ephron the son of Zohar the Hittite, which is before Mamre;

verses.geez:
ገራህቱ ፡ ወበአቱሂ ፡ ዙተሣየጠ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ በኀበ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ኬጢ ፡ ወህየ ፡ ቀበርዎ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ወለሳራ ፡
                  ብእሲቱ ።

translations.lxx: even the field and the cave which Abraam bought of the sons of Chet; there they buried Abraam and Sarrha his wife.
translations.kjv: The field which Abraham purchased of the sons of Heth: there was Abraham buried, and Sarah his wife.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ሞተ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ባረኮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ ወልዱ ፡ ወኀደረ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ መንገለ ፡
                  ዐዘቅተ ፡ ራእይ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass after Abraam was dead, that God blessed Isaac his son, and Isaac dwelt by the well of the vision.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass after the death of Abraham, that God blessed his son Isaac; and Isaac dwelt by the well Lahairoi.

verses.geez: ወከመዝ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ልደቱ ፡ ለይስማኤል ፡ ወልዱ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ዘወለደት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ አጋር ፡ አመተ ፡ ሳራ ።

translations.lxx: And these are the generations of Ismael the son of Abraam, whom Agar the Egyptian the hand-maid of Sarrha bore to Abraam.
translations.kjv: Now these are the generations of Ishmael, Abraham’s son, whom Hagar the Egyptian, Sarah’s handmaid, bare unto Abraham:

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ይስማኤል ፡ በኵሩ ፡ ናቡኤት ፡ ወቄዴር ፡ ወነብዳሔል ፡ ወሜሴን ፤

translations.lxx: And these are the names of the sons of Ismael, according to the names of their generations. The firstborn of Ismael, Nabaioth, and Kedar, and Nabdeel, and Massam,
translations.kjv: And these are the names of the sons of Ishmael, by their names, according to their generations: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebajoth; and Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,

verses.geez: ወመሰሜ ፡ ወአዱማ ፡ ወሜሴ ፤

translations.lxx: and Masma, and Duma, and Masse,
translations.kjv: And Mishma, and Dumah, and Massa,

verses.geez: ወኩዳ ፡ ወቴማን ፡ ወኢያጦር ፡ ወናፌሶ ፡ ወቄዴን ።

translations.lxx: and Choddan, and Thæman, and Jetur, and Naphes, and Kedma.
translations.kjv: Hadar, and Tema, Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah:

verses.geez:
እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ይስማኤል ፡ ወዝንቱ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ በበሀገሮሙ ፡ ወበበማኅደሮሙ ፡ ዐሠርቱ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡
                  መሳፍንት ፡ ለእለ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: These are the sons of Ismael, and these are their names in their tents and in their dwellings, twelve princes according to their nations.
translations.kjv: These are the sons of Ishmael, and these are their names, by their towns, and by their castles; twelve princes according to their nations.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዓመተ ፡ ሕይወቱ ፡ ለይስማኤል ፡ ፻ወ፴ወ፯ዓመቱ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ ረሢኦ ፡ ወተቀብረ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አዝማዲሁ ።

translations.lxx: And these are the years of the life of Ismael, a hundred and thirty-seven years; and he failed and died, and was added to his fathers.
translations.kjv: And these are the years of the life of Ishmael, an hundred and thirty and seven years: and he gave up the ghost and died; and was gathered unto his people.

verses.geez:
ወኀደረ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኤዌሌጥ ፡ እስከ ፡ [ሱ]ር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወበጽሐ ፡ እስከ ፡ አሶርዮስ ፡
                  ወኀደረ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ገጸ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ አኀዊሁ ።

translations.lxx: And he dwelt from Evilat to Sur, which is opposite Egypt, until one comes to the Assyrians; he dwelt in the presence of all his brethren.
translations.kjv: And they dwelt from Havilah unto Shur, that is before Egypt, as thou goest toward Assyria: and he died in the presence of all his brethren.

verses.geez: ወከመዝ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ልደቱ ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ ወልደ ፡ አብርሃም ።

translations.lxx: And these are the generations of Isaac the son of Abraam.
translations.kjv: And these are the generations of Isaac, Abraham’s son: Abraham begat Isaac:

verses.geez:
ወአርብዓ ፡ ዓመቱ ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ አመ ፡ ነሥኣ ፡ ለርብቃ ፡ ወለተ ፡ ባቱኤል ፡ ሶርያዊ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ አፍላግ ፡
                  እኅቱ ፡ ለላባ ፡ ሶርያዊ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትኩኖ ፡ ብእሲቶ ።

translations.lxx: Abraam begot Isaac. And Isaac was forty years old when he took to wife Rebecca, daughter of Bathuel the Syrian, out of Syrian Mesopotamia, sister of Laban the Syrian.
translations.kjv: And Isaac was forty years old when he took Rebekah to wife, the daughter of Bethuel the Syrian of Padanaram, the sister to Laban the Syrian.

verses.geez:
ወይስእል ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በእንተ ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ብእሲቱ ፡ እስመ ፡ መካን ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወሰምዖ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወፀንሰት ፡ ብእሲቱ ፡ ርብቃ ።

translations.lxx: And Isaac prayed the Lord concerning Rebecca his wife, because she was barren; and the Lord heard him, and his wife Rebecca conceived in her womb.
translations.kjv: And Isaac intreated the LORD for his wife, because she was barren: and the LORD was intreated of him, and Rebekah his wife conceived.

verses.geez:
ወይትሐወሱ ፡ ደቂቃ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከርሣ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ እመሰ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ሀለወኒ ፡ እኩን ፡ ለምንት ፡ ሊተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡
                  ወሖረት ፡ ትስአል ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክ ።

translations.lxx: And the babes leaped within her; and she said, If it will be so with me, why is this to me? And she went to enquire of the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the children struggled together within her; and she said, If it be so, why am I thus? And she went to enquire of the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወይቤላ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከርሥኪ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ይወጽኡ ፡
                  እምውስተ ፡ ከርሥኪ ፡ ወሕዝብ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ይኄይስ ፡ ወዘየዐቢ ፡ ይትቀነይ ፡ ለዘይንእሶ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to her, There are two nations in thy womb, and two peoples shall be separated from thy belly, and one people shall excel the other, and the elder shall serve the younger.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto her, Two nations are in thy womb, and two manner of people shall be separated from thy bowels; and the one people shall be stronger than the other people; and the elder shall serve the younger.

verses.geez: ወተፈጸመ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ወሊዶታ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከርሣ ።

translations.lxx: And the days were fulfilled that she should be delivered, and she had twins in her womb.
translations.kjv: And when her days to be delivered were fulfilled, behold, there were twins in her womb.

verses.geez: ወወፅአ ፡ ወልዳ ፡ ዘበኵራ ፡ ወቀይሕ ፡ ኵለንታሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ጽጌ ፡ ረዳ ፡ ወጸጓር ፡ ወሰመየቶ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ዔሳው ።

translations.lxx: And the first came out red, hairy all over like a skin; and she called his name Esau.
translations.kjv: And the first came out red, all over like an hairy garment; and they called his name Esau.

verses.geez:
ወእምድኅሬሁ ፡ ወፅአ ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ወይእኅዝ ፡ በእዴሁ ፡ ሰኰና ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ወሰመየቶ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወስሳ ፡ ዓመቱ ፡
                  ለይስሐቅ ፡ አመ ፡ ወለደቶሙ ፡ ርብቃ ፡ (ለዔሳው ፡ ወለያዕቆብ ።)

translations.lxx: And after this came forth his brother, and his hand took hold of the heel of Esau; and she called his name Jacob. And Isaac was sixty years old when Rebecca bore them.
translations.kjv: And after that came his brother out, and his hand took hold on Esau’s heel; and his name was called Jacob: and Isaac was threescore years old when she bare them.

verses.geez:
ወልህቁ ፡ ወኮኑ ፡ ወራዙተ ፡ [ወኮነ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ብእሴ ፡ ሐቅል ፡ ነዓዌ ፡] ወያዕቆብሰ ፡ ሕሡም ፡ ራእዩ ፡ ወይነብር
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤት ።

translations.lxx: And the lads grew, and Esau was a man skilled in hunting, dwelling in the country, and Jacob a simple man, dwelling in a house.
translations.kjv: And the boys grew: and Esau was a cunning hunter, a man of the field; and Jacob was a plain man, dwelling in tents.

verses.geez: ወአፍቀሮ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ ወልዱ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዘውእቱ ፡ ነዐወ ፡ ይሴሰይ ፡ ወርብቃሰ ፡ ታፈቅሮ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ።

translations.lxx: And Isaac loved Esau, because his venison was his food, but Rebecca loved Jacob.
translations.kjv: And Isaac loved Esau, because he did eat of his venison: but Rebekah loved Jacob.

verses.geez: ወአብሰለት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ወልዳ ፡ ትብሲለ ፡ ወመጽአ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ እምሐቅል ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob cooked pottage, and Esau came from the plain, fainting.
translations.kjv: And Jacob sod pottage: and Esau came from the field, and he was faint:

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ አብልዐኒ ፡ እምነ ፡ ትብሲልከ ፡ እስመ ፡ ደከምኩ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ወበእንተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ተሰምየ
                  ፡ ስሞ ፡ ኤዶም ።

translations.lxx: And Esau said to Jacob, Let me taste of that red pottage, because I am fainting; therefore his name was called Edom.
translations.kjv: And Esau said to Jacob, Feed me, I pray thee, with that same red pottage; for I am faint: therefore was his name called Edom.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ አግብእኬ ፡ ሊተ ፡ በኵረከ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said to Esau, Sell me this day thy birthright.
translations.kjv: And Jacob said, Sell me this day thy birthright.

verses.geez: ወይቤ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ናሁ ፡ እመውት ፡ ለምንት ፡ እንከ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ከዊነ ፡ በኵር ።

translations.lxx: And Esau said, Behold, I am going to die, and for what good does this birthright belong to me?
translations.kjv: And Esau said, Behold, I am at the point to die: and what profit shall this birthright do to me?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ መሐልኬ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ዮም ፡ ከመ ፡ ታግብእ ፡ ሊተ ፡ በኵረከ ፡ ወመሐለ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ ወአግብአ
                  ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ከዊነ ፡ በኵር ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said to him, Swear to me this day; and he swore to him; and Esau sold his birthright to Jacob.
translations.kjv: And Jacob said, Swear to me this day; and he sware unto him: and he sold his birthright unto Jacob.

verses.geez: ወወሀቦ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ ኅብስተ ፡ ወትብሲለ ፡ ብርስን ፡ ወበልዐ ፡ ወሰትየ ፡ ወተንሥአ ፡ ወሖረ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob gave bread to Esau, and pottage of lentiles; and he ate and drank, and he arose and departed; so Esau slighted his birthright.
translations.kjv: Then Jacob gave Esau bread and pottage of lentiles; and he did eat and drink, and rose up, and went his way: thus Esau despised his birthright.
